Query.tables: AEA CT CPR1 P1 PR1 CPR2 P2 PR2 REF
Query.Join: CT.CODE = AEA.ISSUING_CRT_CODE AND CPR1.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR1.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P1.PARTY_ID = CPR1.PARTY_ID AND PR1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P2.PARTY_ID = CPR2.PARTY_ID AND PR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'AE_TYPE' AND REF.RV_LOW_VALUE = AEA.AE_TYPE

Alias.name: FP1.TOTAL_FEES
Alias.select: ( SELECT SUM(FP1.AMOUNT) FROM FEES_PAID FP1 WHERE FP1.PROCESS_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND FP1.PROCESS_TYPE = 'A' AND (FP1.DELETED_FLAG IS NULL OR FP1.DELETED_FLAG = 'N') )

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT FP.FEES_PAID_ID AS "FP.FEES_PAID_ID", FP.AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "FP.AMOUNT_CURRENCY", FP.AMOUNT AS "FP.AMOUNT", FP.USER_ID AS "FP.USER_ID", FP.PROCESS_TYPE AS "FP.PROCESS_TYPE", FP.DATE_CREATED AS "FP.DATE_CREATED", FP.DELETED_FLAG AS "FP.DELETED_FLAG", (SELECT CASE WHEN FP.AMOUNT < 0 THEN 'REFUND' ELSE 'FEE' END FROM FEES_PAID FP1 WHERE FP1.FEES_PAID_ID = FP.FEES_PAID_ID ) AS "FP1.TYPE", 'EXISTING' AS "STATUS", FP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "FP_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM FEES_PAID FP WHERE FP.PROCESS_NUMBER = ${AEA.AE_NUMBER} AND FP.PROCESS_TYPE = 'A' AND (FP.DELETED_FLAG IS NULL OR FP.DELETED_FLAG = 'N')
